title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hero MotoCorp

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hero MotoCorp
jsonLd.description:
Hero MotoCorp is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hero MotoCorp:
Hero MotoCorp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
